title: Avoid multiple page redirects
why: Reduce redirects to improve page load time
notes: Use server-side redirects or remove unnecessary redirects

title: Add meta description
why: Improve search engine results and user experience
notes: Add a meta description tag to the HTML head

title: Improve font display
why: Set `font-display` to `swap` or `optional` to ensure text visibility
notes: Use `font-display: swap` and consider font metric overrides

title: Optimize Time to Interactive
why: Reduce JavaScript execution time and optimize resource loading
notes: Use code splitting, lazy loading, and optimize resource loading

title: Serve images with high resolution
why: Improve image clarity and reduce pixel density
notes: Use responsive images and set image dimensions

title: Increase touch target size and spacing
why: Improve accessibility for users with motor impairments
notes: Adjust CSS to increase touch target size and spacing

title: Allow search engines to crawl pages
why: Implement crawler directives
notes: Use meta tags or HTTP headers to allow crawling

title: Enable back/forward cache restoration
why: Use the bfcache to speed up return navigations
notes: Avoid using `no-store` or `no-cache` headers

title: Optimize image size
why: Reducing image download time improves perceived load time and LCP
notes: Use image compression tools and optimize image formats

title: Make LCP image discoverable
why: Avoid lazy-loading and make LCP image discoverable from HTML immediately
notes: Use inlining or deferring for LCP image

title: Improve Largest Contentful Paint
why: Reduce the time it takes for the largest text or image to be painted
notes: Optimize server response time, leverage content delivery networks (CDNs), and minimize DOM mutations

title: Set explicit width and height on image elements
why: Reduce layout shifts and improve CLS
notes: Add width and height attributes to image elements

title: Optimize document request latency
why: Avoid redirects, ensure fast server response, and enable text compression
notes: Use a content delivery network (CDN) and enable HTTP/2

title: Reduce network dependency tree
why: Avoid chaining critical requests by reducing resource download size or deferring unnecessary resources
notes: Use code splitting, lazy loading, or resource prioritization

title: Optimize First Contentful Paint
why: Improve the time it takes for the first text or image to be painted
notes: Minimize HTTP requests, leverage browser caching, and optimize images

title: Enhance Speed Index
why: Improve the time it takes for page contents to be visibly populated
notes: Minimize DOM mutations, leverage browser caching, and optimize images

title: Optimize CSS
why: Reduce network activity and improve page load time
notes: Use tools to identify and remove unused CSS rules

title: Optimize JavaScript
why: Reduce network activity and improve page load time
notes: Use tools to identify and remove unused JavaScript code

title: Deferring or inlining render-blocking requests
why: Move network requests out of the critical path to improve LCP
notes: Use inlining, deferring, or code splitting for render-blocking requests

title: Reduce Max Potential First Input Delay
why: Minimize the duration of the longest task
notes: Minimize JavaScript execution time, leverage browser caching, and optimize server response time
